text:
The Plot of Beach NPC is a young NPC woman that leads Greed Island players that meet the preexisting requirements, on a quest to acquire the "Plot of Beach" card. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 155 

Appearance

The Plot of Beach NPC has a thin, petite body, wears her hair tied back that is held in place by a hairband, large, glazed-over eyes, prominent upper and lower eyelashes, and thin lips. She wears a tank top, plain shorts, and shoes. 

Personality

The NPC speaks in a deep morose, monotone monologue and barely expresses any emotions when stating her programmed lines. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

When Kazsule's Alliance arrives in Soufrabi and asks around town for information on the "Plot of Beach", Kazsule finds the Plot of Beach NPC, who divulges that the Plot of Beach is a place where a treasure lies. Furthermore, the treasure attracted a group of ruthless pirates that conquered the town fifteen years ago, led by Razor and his 14 Devils, who killed all of the fishermen with any information about the location of "Plot of Beach", including her father and brother. Though the NPC is privy to the location of the card, thanks to her brother. After a brief discussion with his alliance, Kazsule asks the woman for the location of the Pirates' Base. 

A couple of weeks passed, and the Razor Pirates were defeated by Team Gon and allies, and so the NPC led the group to the top of the lighthouse. There, she activates a hidden switch underneath one of the windows that shines a beacon light on the location of "Plot of Beach". She confesses that there is no treasure in the underwater cave, as it's just an exaggerated myth, and she wanted to convey this to the pirates, but thought they would never believe her. Gon inquires why they wouldn't tell the pirates of the "Plot of Beach" location? The NPC responds that it's a sacred place to them and would never reveal its location, even if it cost them their lives. This saddens Gon, but Killua reminds him it's just a game. The NPC gazes out onto the ocean as the sun rises, saying she can finally enjoy the view from the lighthouse again. She admits that her treasure is the ocean itself. She then transforms into the "Plot of Beach" card. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 17, Chapter 169 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Her name was never given in the manga or any anime adaptation.
